name: nana-go
description: Canonical repository verification profile for local completion evidence.

stages.name: lint
stages.description: Check Go formatting without modifying files.

stages.name: typecheck
stages.description: Compile Go packages and tests without running test bodies.

changed_scope.description: Advisory changed-file map for local iteration. Run the union of matching checks; use full_check when no path matches, risk is cross-cutting, or release confidence is required.

full_check.description: Canonical full repository fallback for release confidence.

paths.name: verify-profile
paths.description: Verification CLI/profile edits should prove profile parsing and evidence output still work.

paths.name: runtime-guidance-assets
paths.description: Agent guidance/template edits should keep generated assets and setup guidance synchronized.

paths.name: go-source
paths.description: Go source changes should at least run the canonical Go stages unless a narrower package test is justified.

paths.name: docs-only
paths.description: Documentation-only edits can start with whitespace/conflict-marker checks before the full fallback.
